---
title: "Contact"
---

Stephen Rhodes  
<strike>
Psychology (F15)  
The University of Edinburgh  
7 George Square  
Edinburgh  
EH8 9JZ
</strike>

In process of moving to Mizzou...

email: srhodes@exseed.ed.ac.uk

twitter: @[stephenrho](https://twitter.com/stephenrho)

phone: <strike> 0131 650 3457 </strike>

<div style="text-align: center"><img src="files/sr.jpg" width="400"></div>
